sections.title: LinkedIn testimonials
sections.note: Marie-Odile Lhomme role on live is longer (includes 'membre FrenchWomenCIO...'); extraction shortens to 'Chief Digital & Information Officer' which is acceptable canonical form.

sections.title: Et si vous étiez vraiment au centre
Laissez nos clients vous parler
sections.note: Text field stores 'Company — Sector — Employees' summary, faithful to live data points.

audit.summary: Extraction is faithful to the live page. All 18 sections are present in the correct order, with canonical fields properly assigned. Hero, press quotes, LinkedIn testimonials, intros, stats, 5 feature-splits, mid-page CTA, comparison table, marketplace feature, methodology intro, podcast related items, customer testimonials grid, and final CTA all match the live HTML. Minor abbreviation of Marie-Odile Lhomme's lengthy role title is acceptable. Customer testimonials use the 'text' field as a meta-summary (company — sector — employees) rather than a quote, which is a reasonable mapping given live shows no quote text in those cards.
